data.body: DECISION (user-approved 2026-06-30): 'support both'. Provenance reads REBAR_SESSION_ID (explicit, rebar-owned) with precedence, falling back to ambient SESSION_ID (unchanged), then short git HEAD, then 'unknown'. Additive + backward-compatible (no change for users relying on ambient SESSION_ID); explicit non-colliding override per rebar's REBAR_<KEY>-prefix + alias-window convention (60ce). Not epic-shaped — a one-line provenance decision. Implementation tracked as a separate task relates_to session-env epic 38ec. Closing as decided.
